intelligence.hypothesis: Insufficient telemetry; awaiting next valid capture.

vision_report.compositional_truth_check: The registry is largely invalidated by the current visual data. P1 (String of Nickels) and P2 (Mexican Mint) are not visible or are indistinguishable from soil debris. P3 (Pothos) is present but severely compromised. P4 (Silver Guest) is absent.

inventory_reconciliation.P3: Present (Pothos leaf visible, rabbit anchor present)

plant_audit.P1: Yellow pot contains only dark, undisturbed soil.
plant_audit.P2: Black pot contains only dark, undisturbed soil.
plant_audit.P3: Pothos leaf is present but shows signs of chlorosis and turgor loss. The white rabbit anchor remains in situ.
plant_audit.P4: No evidence of the Silver Guest specimen.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Soil appears consistently dark and potentially over-saturated or compacted.
biome_observations.debris: Eggshell fragments are present in the P3 pot, acting as a persistent anomaly.
biome_observations.desk_surface: Clean, no significant organic matter or fungal blooms detected.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t4: Initial state shows a single green stem in the foreground pot.
temporal_deltas.t4_to_t3: Stem appears to maintain position; no significant growth.
temporal_deltas.t2_to_t1: Significant shift to low-light/blue-spectrum illumination; visibility of plant structures drops sharply.
temporal_deltas.t1_to_current: Current state shows near-total darkness; plant structures are obscured by lack of ambient light.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of critical decline. The lack of visible foliage in P1, P2, and P4 suggests total specimen loss. P3 is the only surviving occupant, currently exhibiting signs of severe stress or dormancy.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a catastrophic failure of the botanical biome. Starting from a state where at least one specimen was visible, the environment has transitioned into a low-light, high-obscurity state where only a single, struggling Pothos leaf remains identifiable. The registry is no longer representative of the physical reality of the desk.
